reasoning: This is a straightforward type error fix — the root cause is a string literal being passed where a number is expected. The fix is isolated to two files with clear type annotations.
refinedTitle: Fix TypeScript type errors in task-discovery service
refinedDescription: Two type errors in task-discovery.ts: (1) confidence field assigned a string instead of number, (2) undefined passed to saveSignal where string is required. Plus one implicit-any in routes.ts. All are compile-time errors with obvious fixes.
